title: Packed array parameter types parse as expressions
body:
I'm seeing the problem on master. This code
```
module tb #(
    parameter type one_t = logic,
    parameter type two_t = one_t[1:0]
)();
endmodule
```
results in
```
%Error: issue.sv:3:28: Data type used where a non-data type is expected: 'one_t'
    3 |     parameter type two_t = one_t[1:0]
      |                            ^~~~~
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.045 for more assistance.
%Error: issue.sv:3:33: Expecting a data type, not SELEXTRACT: ''
    3 |     parameter type two_t = one_t[1:0]
      |                                 ^
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
```

`linkdot-preerr.tree` shows:
```
    1:2: PARAMTYPEDTYPE 0x564f3476a750 <e1222#> {e3au} u1=0x564f34745710 @dt=0@  two_t -> REQUIREDTYPE 0x564f3473d760 <e1219#> {e3au} @dt=0@
    1:2:1: REQUIREDTYPE 0x564f3473d760 <e1219#> {e3au} @dt=0@
    1:2:1:1: SELEXTRACT 0x564f3473d550 <e1217#> {e3bh} u3=0x1 @dt=0@
    1:2:1:1:1: PARSEREF 0x564f347c78c0 <e886> {e3bc} u3=0x1 @dt=0@  one_t
    1:2:1:1:2: CONST 0x564f347bd590 <e887> {e3bi} @dt=0x564f347b63c0@(G/swu32/1)  ?32?sh1
    1:2:1:1:3: CONST 0x564f347bd680 <e888> {e3bk} @dt=0x564f347b63c0@(G/swu32/1)  ?32?sh0
```

Bisecting, this started happening after #6732. It seems that the change `data_typeAny->exprOrDataType` results in an expression being parsed in this case, and there is no subsequent code which converts a `SELEXTRACT` expression into a `PACKARRAYDTYPE` (which was how the example above was parsed before that change).
code_blocks:
module tb #(
    parameter type one_t = logic,
    parameter type two_t = one_t[1:0]
)();
endmodule
%Error: issue.sv:3:28: Data type used where a non-data type is expected: 'one_t'
    3 |     parameter type two_t = one_t[1:0]
      |                            ^~~~~
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.045 for more assistance.
%Error: issue.sv:3:33: Expecting a data type, not SELEXTRACT: ''
    3 |     parameter type two_t = one_t[1:0]
      |                                 ^
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
    1:2: PARAMTYPEDTYPE 0x564f3476a750 <e1222#> {e3au} u1=0x564f34745710 @dt=0@  two_t -> REQUIREDTYPE 0x564f3473d760 <e1219#> {e3au} @dt=0@
    1:2:1: REQUIREDTYPE 0x564f3473d760 <e1219#> {e3au} @dt=0@
    1:2:1:1: SELEXTRACT 0x564f3473d550 <e1217#> {e3bh} u3=0x1 @dt=0@
    1:2:1:1:1: PARSEREF 0x564f347c78c0 <e886> {e3bc} u3=0x1 @dt=0@  one_t
    1:2:1:1:2: CONST 0x564f347bd590 <e887> {e3bi} @dt=0x564f347b63c0@(G/swu32/1)  ?32?sh1
    1:2:1:1:3: CONST 0x564f347bd680 <e888> {e3bk} @dt=0x564f347b63c0@(G/swu32/1)  ?32?sh0
